name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Bernie’s team is all-in on California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
A primary win in California: | Hey from California -- we're just three weeks out from our big contest here, which means we're pretty darn hard at work building a massive grassroots campaign. Let's acknowledge right up front that this primary is all but over (we do have a nearly insurmountable delegate and popular vote lead, after all).

But I also want to make sure you know that Bernie’s team is working hard to pull off a big upset here to try and make some trouble. If we want to make sure that doesn’t happen, we have to do this together. **[If you can spare $1 to help with our efforts, that would go a long way.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU1MDMxODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDY0MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

As the team out here works to bring home a primary win in California, other teams are already focused on the general election -- we’re fending off attacks from Donald Trump and building massive operations in battleground states.

And here's the thing: Bernie’s team doesn’t have to do that, so they can focus 100 percent of their efforts on California. That’s why your support is so important right now -- we need to be strong enough to take on Bernie’s grassroots army and Donald Trump at the same time.

**We’re so grateful you’re on this team, and together, we’re going to make Hillary our nominee and our next president. That starts with you -- can you help with $1 right now?**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU1MDMxODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDY0MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks so much,

Buffy

Buffy Wicks
California State Director
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU1MDMxODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDY0MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU1MDMxODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDY0MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU1MDMxODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDY0MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU1MDMxODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDY0MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU1MDMxODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDY0MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU1MDMxODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDY0MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU1MDMxODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDY0MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU1MDMxODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDY0MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU1MDMxODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDY0MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU1MDMxODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDY0MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU1MDMxODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDY0MjUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Jordan Marks
subject: URGENT: Koch brothers spending in PA
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8482221910342500352/262920717991936000?refcode=e20160517&refcode2=e20160517nd&amount=25)
---
**_Politics PA_ : "Koch Brothers to Target Toomey-McGinty Race"
[Help Katie fight back and defeat the Kochs: Rush an urgent $5 donation >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8482221910342500352/262920717991936000?refcode=e20160517&refcode2=e20160517nd&amount=25)** Friend, it happened: The Koch brothers and their shady millionaire network just announced their plan for Pennsylvania: **Spend big to defeat Katie.**

The Kochs and their cronies are notorious for _spending hundreds of millions of dollars_ to defeat Democrats and elect fringe GOP candidates -- and **they 've just named Pennsylvania's Senate race one of their top targets this year.**

**We need an unprecedented surge of support RIGHT NOW to show the Kochs they 're no match for our grassroots team. Make an urgent donation to elect Katie, defeat the Kochs and take back the Senate for Democrats:**

[**www.KatieMcGinty.com/Stop-the-Kochs**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8482221910342500352/262920717991936000?refcode=e20160517&refcode2=e20160517nd&amount=25)

There's no doubt: The Kochs are jumping into Katie's race because they know Toomey's never been more vulnerable -- the polls show us locked in a dead heat.

Going up against Toomey and his $9 million war chest is one thing, but fighting back against the Kochs and their bottomless cash is something else entirely.

**If we don 't build up the resources now, we risk letting the Kochs buy Pennsylvania's Senate seat. Democrats nationwide are counting on us -- and Katie -- to win back our majority.**

[**Will you step up now? Donate $5 today >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8482221910342500352/262920717991936000?refcode=e20160517&refcode2=e20160517nd&amount=25)

Thanks for being there,

Jordan Marks
Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8482221910342500352/262920717991936000?refcode=e20160517&refcode2=e20160517nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8482221910342500352/190863123954008064).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Friends of Steve Bullock
subject: Join Us for Lunch at the Lake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
Please join our hosts
Brad & Francene Archibald, Evan & Gail Barrett, George Brimhall,
Frank Cote, David & Elizabeth Erickson, Eric & Ellen Feaver,
Tim & Gayle Flynn, IUPAT District Council 82,
Bill & Anita Kearns, Mark & Melissa Kovacich, Bea McCarthy,
David & Monica Paoli, Ed Rogers, Bill Rossbach, Grace Santafemia,
Terry & Carol Trieweiler, Dan & Brandie Villa and Danny Wong

for lunch at Georgetown Lake to support the reelection of
**Governor Steve Bullock**

**& Lt. Governor Mike Cooney

**
**Sunday, June 5, 2016
12:00p.m. - 2:00p.m.**

**At the home of the Honorable Brian & Nancy Schweitzer
Georgetown Lake, Montana**

Suggested contribution to **Friends of Steve Bullock** :
**Guest** : $100, **Friend** : $660, **Sponsor** : $1320

Children attend free

[**RSVP ONLINE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=KmbBeu8rnuJjGjPwS9pwIw3DXMpa%2BVOh)
---

Rain or shine...join us for a good time and to
support Steve before the June 7th Primary.

_
_Driving Directions_ : Turn off MT Highway 1 and cross Georgetown Lake Dam
to Georgetown Lake Road. _Turn left on Piney Point Road and continue_
_to the end of the road _ _(a total drive of 3 miles _ __from the dam.)__
__Event location will be marked with signs and parking attendants will greet you.__

_Call [406.558.4728](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=J7G1G50Xr8Cbyc2dazcvew3DXMpa%2BVOh) or email [brock@stevebullock.com](mailto:brock@stevebullock.com)
with any questions or to host.
*Host committee is in formation. Please consider hosting.
**Can't attend? Please consider still giving **[**ONLINE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ITrAVX99K85b0ZENK2v0tQ3DXMpa%2BVOh)

The campaign can accept $660 for the 2016 Primary Election and $660 for the 2016 General Election from individuals and Political Action Committees.
Corporate contributions are not permitted. Contributions are not tax deductible.
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=0Tqc2NbuXUBvqsbUxrJp6g3DXMpa%2BVOh).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---

name: Donna Edwards
subject: Add your name: Join Off the Sidelines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
body:
Friend,
When more women are involved at the decision-making table, we make better decisions.
Every study shows it. But across the board -- in Washington, in boardrooms, state legislatures, city councils -- women are not fully represented. And it's because the same old barriers still exist.
The presumptive GOP nominee accuses Hillary Clinton of playing the "woman card" just for speaking about issues that affect women, the media still labels women "difficult" or "not a team player" if they think independently, and our campaign finance system allows only those who already have power and influence to have the resources to compete.
It's not right, and it's not good for our country. That's why we need to go all-in to help my friend Kirsten and join her movement Off the Sidelines. They encourage women from city council to the White House to get involved and run for office, then provide the resources they need to win.
[**Will you join Off the Sidelines and help more women run for office? Add your name here and show you 're ready to fight against the barriers holding women back.**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff4b/767134fb/5c39af94/43381b24/1099043725/VEsH/ "http://action.kirstengillibrand.com/p/dia/action3/common/public/?action_KEY=1122&track=edwards")
Think about how our decisions in Washington would be different with 51% of Congress made up of women.
No attacks on Planned Parenthood, no more stalling on legislation for equal pay, and issues that affect women and families would be first on the agenda -- not just an afterthought.
**We are facing a critical moment. We can make history up and down the ticket in 2016 and break down barriers for millions of women across the country, but only if all of us stand together and fight for it.**
Are you in, friend?
[**Say you 're in to build a movement to put more women in positions of power. Add your name here to join Off the Sidelines.**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff4b/767134fb/5c39af94/43381b24/1099043725/VEsE/ "http://action.kirstengillibrand.com/p/dia/action3/common/public/?action_KEY=1122&track=edwards")
Thank you,
Donna

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you would like to receive less email, please [click here](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff4b/767134fb/5c39af94/43381b25/1099043725/VEsF/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/s/receive-less-email"). Email is the best way to stay in contact with supporters like you, but if you wish to unsubscribe from all emails, please [click here.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff4b/767134fb/5c39af94/43381b22/1099043725/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
Donna Edwards for Senate
P.O Box 44305
Ft. Washington, MD 20749

************
********************

The presumptive GOP nominee accuses Hillary Clinton of playing the "woman card" just for speaking about issues that affect women, the media still labels women "difficult" or "not a team player" if they think independently, and our campaign finance system allows only those who already have power and influence to have the resources to compete. name: Mike Mikus
subject: a travesty (add your name)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4201887164193046528/-6582269240634507264)
---
Friend --

Maybe you've been in this situation: Your elderly parent is recovering from surgery and needs care, but you can't get the time off work. Or you and your spouse are about to welcome a new baby, but you can't afford to take unpaid leave.

The sad reality is that although millions of workers are balancing the demands of caring for young children or aging parents with a full time job, only 12 percent of U.S. private sector workers have access to paid family leave. Far too many working families are left without the basic support they need to get a fair shot at the American Dream. And Republicans in Washington are refusing to do anything about it!

[**We must demand a comprehensive plan for paid family leave. Add your name today >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4201887164193046528/-6582269240634507264)

It's a travesty that in the wealthiest country in the world, we don't give our workers the guarantee of paid time off when they need it most -- to provide support and care for their family. These critical polices have positive benefits for our economy too. Paid family leave increases working retention, saving business the significant cost that comes with replacing employees.

As Senator, **Katie will fight to pass legislation that will support the middle class and give working families a better chance at a prosperous future. Let 's stand with her in support of expanding access to paid family and medical leave.**

[**Add your name to tell Congress: It 's time for comprehensive national paid leave.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4201887164193046528/-6582269240634507264)

Thanks,

Mike Mikus
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4201887164193046528/-6438154052558651392?refcode=e20160517.2&refcode2=e20160517.2&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4201887164193046528/-6654326834672435200).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

subject: we're on the air
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC
body:

name: Tom Russell, RussFeingold.com
subject: Verbal gymnastics
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
They mean the exact same thing. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42ba/1c469400/57e5786/356358a/1686820319/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/russfeingold/posts/10153718381808215") Friend, **In the beginning, Ron Johnson joked about campaigning with Donald Trump.** "It'd be the Ronald and the Donald!" **Then, he said he would support the Republican nominee for president:** "I am certainly going to endorse the Republican nominee, and obviously it looks like that will be Mr. Trump." Now, he's getting nervous and says that "supporting" Trump doesn't mean he's "endorsing" Trump. Huh? **Newsflash: "Support" and "endorse" mean the exact same thing.** **[We're not going to let Ron Johnson wiggle out of this: Help us spread the word by sharing the news about Ron Johnson and Donald Trump with your friends and family on Facebook.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42ba/1c469400/57e5786/356358a/1686820319/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/russfeingold/posts/10153718381808215")** In fact, just this weekend, Senator Ron Johnson told a reporter that he "sympathizes" with Trump. Yeah, you read that right: The multi-millionaire from Oshkosh "sympathizes" with the billionaire from New York. It's only a matter of time until Senator Johnson tries to talk his way out of this one before hitting the campaign trail with Donald Trump. We're gearing up for that day. Thanks, Tom Russell
Campaign Manager | [SHARE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42ba/1c469400/57e5786/356358a/1686820319/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/russfeingold/posts/10153718381808215")
---

\------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: SteveBullock.com
subject: clear as the river
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

‪We've seen this story before. Wealthy guy moves to Montana, buys up land, and tries to keep Montanans out of it.‬

**But this time the guy is someone who thinks he should be our next governor. ‬**

In 2009, Greg Gianforte sued the people of Montana to remove an easement that allowed public access to the East Gallatin River, claiming it was "unnecessary" because Montanans could access the river at other points. How many times have we heard that line before? He even had to be told by the state to "remove the intimidating signs and gate that keep people from accessing" the river.‬

On the flip side, in 2009, then-Attorney General Steve Bullock was working with the legislature to pass the first new stream access law in 24 years and was standing up to landowners who placed locked gates on public roads. And now as governor, Steve has been a steadfast champion of our public lands and streams.‬

‪The contrast is as clear as the river Greg tried to keep the public out of. ‬

**[Join me and kick $10, $15, or whatever you can afford today.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JBwQ%2FJrmtQaXeXRD62%2BRHgE0bGyVPPC6)**

Steve has a big fundraising deadline tomorrow and it's time to send a message. It's a small price to pay to ensure Montanans can continue to access the land we all own.‬

Thanks,

Bill Orsello
Sportsman
---
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=6ynHjJNL4fvTBWZweWD3VgE0bGyVPPC6)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=oYJYXh%2BnrekLDhFb%2FUEEKAE0bGyVPPC6).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Jared Small, EricGreitens.com
subject: Team Greitens lands in KC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
You've been following the governor's race, so you know the political establishment in Missouri is scared to death of Eric's campaign. And they should be! Eric Greitens is a conservative outsider and a Navy SEAL, and he has the best team of volunteers in Missouri. Supporters have been working nonstop in all corners of the state, and now Team Greitens has a new base of operations in Kansas City!
Join us at the grand opening of our Kansas City Regional Office this **Thursday, May 19th at 5:30 pm** to enjoy free food, make phone calls, and meet other Team Greitens members from the area. Eric will be there around 7:30 pm to thank you for your support and dedication to the mission.
**Kansas City Field Office Grand Opening**
706 SE 3rd St
Lee's Summit, MO 64063

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: re: Trump’s taxes (add your name!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Trump is hiding something here. | Friend --

Every presidential candidate since 1980 has released their history of tax returns.

This kind of disclosure is an opportunity for voters to do their research on whether candidates are paying their fair share (and get a little preview of how a candidate deals with economic management). Among other things, tax returns show us how someone spends their money, whether they’re charitable, and who they choose to associate with in business deals.

Donald Trump has refused over and over again to release his returns. (Never mind that he called for Mitt Romney to do so in 2012!)

**He’s hiding something. It’s time to find out what. Join Hillary in calling on Donald Trump to release his tax returns right now:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU1MTM2MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNTk4ODI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

|
**Donald Trump is the presumptive Republican nominee. This is the only team that can stop him -- chip in $1 to help take Trump on:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU1MTM2MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNTk4ODI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

clean_body: Trump is hiding something here. | Friend -- Every presidential candidate since 1980 has released their history of tax returns. This kind of disclosure is an opportunity for voters to do their research on whether candidates are paying their fair share (and get a little preview of how a candidate deals with economic management). Among other things, tax returns show us how someone spends their money, whether they’re charitable, and who they choose to associate with in business deals. Donald Trump has refused over and over again to release his returns. (Never mind that he called for Mitt Romney to do so in 2012!) He’s hiding something. It’s time to find out what. Join Hillary in calling on Donald Trump to release his tax returns right now: Thanks, Christina Christina Reynolds Deputy Communications Director Hillary for America | Donald Trump is the presumptive Republican nominee. This is the only team that can stop him -- chip in $1 to help take Trump on: | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
